description: Docker host and container metrics for Swarm, Compose, and standalone Docker nodes

targets.expr: sum(node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{node_cluster=~"$node_cluster", node_name=~"$node_name"} - node_memory_MemFree_bytes{node_cluster=~"$node_cluster", node_name=~"$node_name"} - node_memory_Cached_bytes{node_cluster=~"$node_cluster", node_name=~"$node_name"} - node_memory_Buffers_bytes{node_cluster=~"$node_cluster", node_name=~"$node_name"} - node_memory_Slab_bytes{node_cluster=~"$node_cluster", node_name=~"$node_name"}) by (node_name)
count by (node_name, workload_name) (container_last_seen{node_cluster=~"$node_cluster", node_name=~"$node_name", workload_name!="", image!=""})
count by (node_name, workload_name) (max_over_time(container_start_time_seconds{node_cluster=~"$node_cluster", node_name=~"$node_name", workload_name!="", image!=""}[$__range]) > time() - $__range_s)
min by (node_name, workload_name) (time() - container_start_time_seconds{node_cluster=~"$node_cluster", node_name=~"$node_name", workload_name!="", image!=""})
sum by (node_name, workload_name) (increase(container_oom_events_total{node_cluster=~"$node_cluster", node_name=~"$node_name", workload_name!="", image!=""}[$__range]))

title: Docker Nodes
